proposals.title: GRC White-Label Rev-Share 30%
proposals.description: Authorise the GRC white-label rev-share program: 30% recurring rev to certified GRC partners who resell MEOK Sovereign / Pro / Enterprise tiers to their clients. Term: 2-year. Exit: 6mo notice. Certification: BFT-council-voted. Target: 5 partners by 4 Jul, 15 partners by 30 Sep.

proposals.title: Care-Membrane £1,495 Onboarding Special — First 5 Social-Care Providers
proposals.description: Authorise the care-membrane £1,495 onboarding special for the first 5 social-care providers (Cera, HC-One, Four Seasons, Barchester, Care UK). Includes: 30-min care-membrane-mcp demo, full Article 50 attestation cert, CQC documentation pack, 6 months Pro tier at no charge. Marketing hook: UK care homes are the canary in the AI coal mine.

proposals.title: Free Tier → Pro Tier 14-Day Trial
proposals.description: Authorise a 14-day Pro trial for free-tier users who hit the 3-attestations/day cap. Trial includes unlimited attestations + public verify URLs + own HMAC signing key (Pro features). Auto-converts to £199/mo Stripe subscription at end of trial unless cancelled. Conversion target: 8% trial-to-paid (industry benchmark for dev tools).

proposals.title: Article 50 Kit £999 One-Time Fixed-Fee
proposals.description: Lock the Article 50 Kit pricing at £999 (confirmed 2 Aug deadline + two-layer marking per AGENTS.md). Includes: Annex IV documentation pack, 10 unlimited attestations, CQC + ICO + NHS evidence bundle, 1hr consultation with CSOAI Ltd compliance team. Fixed-fee (not monthly) because the deadline is hard. Currently in market at £999 — propose no change.

proposals.title: 5 Unified .AI Industry Packages — Final Lock
proposals.description: Lock the 5 unified .AI industry packages as the canonical industry pitch surface for 4 Jul launch: fintech.industries.meok.ai (Monzo/Starling/Zopa/ClearScore), healthtech.industries.meok.ai (Babylon/AccuRx/NHS), care.industries.meok.ai (Cera/HC-One/14 LAs), regtech.industries.meok.ai (GRC partners), govtech.industries.meok.ai (Faculty/Cabinet Office). Each page: industry-specific case studies + relevant MCP servers + keystone CTA. Currently LIVE — propose no change.

proposals.title: MEOK App PWA Distribution Strategy
proposals.description: Authorise the MEOK App PWA distribution strategy: app-deploy.vercel.app (10.6KB) installable on iOS Safari 11.3+, Android Chrome 40+, macOS, Windows, Linux — all browsers, all OS, mobile, across board. Per store-ready config: PWABuilder.com for .ipa/.aab/.msix, Capacitor for native shells. 5 reasons why PWA > native: no app store tax, no review delay, live updates, one codebase, sovereign UK. Currently LIVE — propose distribution go-ahead.
